family_accords.label: fougere
family_accords.description: Lavender and bergamot over coumarin, oakmoss, and aromatic herbs.

family_accords.label: chypre
family_accords.description: Bright citrus sliding into mossy, resinous, patchouli or labdanum depth.

family_accords.label: amber
family_accords.description: Warm vanilla, benzoin, labdanum, tonka, balsam, and resin structure.

family_accords.label: gourmand
family_accords.description: Edible dessert register: vanilla, caramel, cacao, praline, honey, or sugar.

family_accords.label: woody amber
family_accords.description: Modern transparent wood built from ambroxan, iso e super, cashmeran, and related materials.

family_accords.label: leather
family_accords.description: Dry, smoky, suede, birch tar, saffron, labdanum, or animalic leather impression.

family_accords.label: animalic
family_accords.description: Indolic, musky, civet-like, castoreum-like, or bodily warmth.

family_accords.label: tobacco
family_accords.description: Dried leaf, hay, vanilla, spice, smoke, dried fruit, or tobacco pouch character.

family_accords.label: aldehydic floral
family_accords.description: Soapy, waxy aldehydic lift over rose, jasmine, iris, ylang, or white florals.
